chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P No. D- 4652 of 2025 a/w C.P Nos. D- 4653 & 4844 of 2025. ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ Priority. 1. For hearing of CMA No. 19438/25. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.02.2026 Mr. Shams Mohiuddin Ansari, Advocate for Petitioners in CP No. D- 4652 & 4653 of 2025. Mr. Muhammad Usman Alam, Advocate for Petitioner in CP No. D- 4844/2025. Mr. Ghazi Khan Khalil, Advocate for Respondents. Mr. Faheem Raza, Advocate for Respondents. Mr. Shamshad Ahmed, Advocate for Respondents. ---------- Learned counsel submits that the relief sought by the Petitioners has been allowed for the time being by the department. He submits that the Petitions are not being pressed. In view of such statement, the Petitions stand disposed of accordingly. Office to place a copy of this Order in the connected Petitions listed above. Judge Judge Ayaz
